Disclaimer

⚠️ Important Notice

The CBAM Calculator tool and all content on this website are provided for informational and educational purposes only. Nothing on this website constitutes legal, tax, customs, or professional advice.

Calculation Estimates

The CBAM cost estimates generated by our calculator are approximations based on:

  • EU default emission values (which include a 10% markup in 2026)
  • Representative EU ETS prices (subject to daily fluctuations)
  • Simplified assumptions about product categories
  • General country-level carbon pricing data

Actual CBAM costs will differ based on your specific products, verified supplier emission data, exact EU ETS prices at time of declaration, and other factors we cannot account for.

Not Professional Advice

This website does not provide and is not a substitute for:

  • Legal advice from qualified attorneys
  • Tax advice from certified tax professionals
  • Customs advice from licensed customs brokers
  • Official guidance from EU or member state authorities

For all CBAM compliance decisions, you should consult with qualified professionals who can review your specific circumstances.

No Liability

We expressly disclaim all liability for any losses, damages, or penalties that may arise from:

  • Reliance on our calculator estimates for business decisions
  • Incorrect or outdated information on this website
  • Misinterpretation of CBAM regulations
  • Technical errors or service unavailability

Regulatory Changes

EU CBAM regulations are subject to ongoing implementation and potential amendments. We make reasonable efforts to keep our information current, but cannot guarantee that all content reflects the latest regulatory developments. Always verify information with official EU sources.

External Links

This website may contain links to external resources, including official EU documents. We are not responsible for the content, accuracy, or availability of external websites.

No Endorsement

Reference to any specific products, services, or organizations does not constitute or imply endorsement by CBAM Calculator.

By using this website, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this disclaimer and agree to its terms.

CBAM Calculator.eu

Free compliance tools for EU importers. Estimate your Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism certificate costs, check CBAM obligations, and collect supplier emission data.

Built on EU Regulation (EU) 2023/956. Not affiliated with the European Commission.

Results are for informational purposes only and do not constitute legal, tax, or customs advice. EU ETS prices are periodically updated and may not reflect current market rates. Always consult qualified professionals for compliance decisions.
